caption: In a brightly lit room, a person's hands are seen interacting with a stack of sports cards on a colorful table featuring palm tree designs. In the initial frames, the person is lifting a small yellow cardboard sleeve from the top of a stack. The scene includes a background with a monitor displaying a logo that reads "JASPYS" and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". A man wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt with a yellow logo is visible in a small inset window on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the person removes a baseball card from the yellow sleeve. The card features a photograph of Ken Griffey Jr. and includes his name "KEN GRIFFEY JR." printed at the bottom, along with a signature. The final frames show the person holding the card up for view, while the yellow sleeve remains on the table.
